prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely, here goes:

You've got this! Every journey begins with a single step, and today is your day to shine. Remember why you started and what you'll gain by completing this task. It's okay to have apprehensions, but don't let them hold you back. Each minute you spend avoiding it is a minute you could spend making progress.

Break it down into smaller parts if it feels overwhelming. You don't have to do it all at once. Just start with one small step. You're capable of more than you think, and every effort brings you one step closer to victory.

So, take a deep breath, roll up your sleeves, and dive in. You're going to feel so accomplished and proud of yourself once it's done. Go get 'em!
